summary.quantification_method: TMT PSM ratios to the reference TMT channels

primary_variables.matched_definition: Comparison between disease and matched control cohorts.
evidence: performed in-depth mass spectrometry (MS)-based proteogenomic analysis of 141 tumors representing all major histologies of non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC).
The early-stage cohort (also referred to as the “discovery cohort”) comprised resected lung cancer tumor samples from a total of 192 patients with operable lung cancer

primary_variables.matched_definition: Comparison between samples grouped by specific molecular variants.
evidence: Panel sequencing confirmed previously reported mutation patterns in NSCLC and revealed enrichment of EGFR mutations in Subtype 1; STK11, KEAP1 and SMARCA4 in Subtype 4; RB1 mutations in Subtype 5 and TP53 mutations in Subtype 6
strong coincidence between STK11 mutation and high FGL1 protein and mRNA levels in Subtype 4

attributes.route_or_context: HepG2 cells (liver cancer) and STK11-mutated lung cancer cell lines (NCI-H1944 and NCI-H1395)
evidence: Treatment of HepG2 cells (liver cancer) with the AMPK activator A-769662 for 24 and 48 h resulted in reduced levels of HNF1A and FGL1 as evaluated by Western blot analysis
the same effect of AMPK activation on HNF1A and FGL1 levels was detected in STK11-mutated (mut) lung cancer cell lines, NCI-H1944 and NCI-H1395
we validated the role of STK11 signaling in a rescue experiment by introducing wild-type (wt) STK11 in NCI-H1944 cells

replicate_hints: three replicate experiments showed that STK11wt protein expression was associated with loss of both FGL1 and HNF1A
multiplex_channel_hints: In each set, there were 9 tumors and one reference pool

evidence: Protein quantification by TMT 10-plex reporter ions was calculated using TMT PSM ratios to the reference TMT channels
significantly longer RFS in Subtype 1 cases than in Subtype 4 cases

quantification_strategy: TMT PSM ratios to the reference TMT channels

base_candidates_ranked.reason: PRIDE metadata and text explicitly state the use of TMT 10-plex labeling and data-dependent acquisition (DDA) for the discovery cohort.
The text describes a separate label-free data-independent acquisition (DIA) analysis for the validation and late-stage cohorts.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The authors explicitly performed a 'proteogenomics 6FT search' searching MS-data against a peptide database produced by 6-reading frame translation of the entire human genome.
